title: Tag Name
text: Tag Name Specify the name of the tag associated with a polygon or group of polygons. This is the value returned in the widget field when the user selects an enabled polygon in the map widget. Each polygon's Tag Name is added to the field's ValRep. Uniface gives the default Tag Name TAGNAMEn to a new polygon. You can rename this if you wish. If you give a new polygon the same name as an existing tag, Uniface asks whether you want to combine this new polygon with the existing polygon, making one tag with multiple areas (polygons).
